# FFCAP_ET_CUSTOMFORCE | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFCAP_ET_CUSTOMFORCE ](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_customforce)

-  FFCAP_ET_CUSTOMFORCE 

Global Variable# FFCAP_ET_CUSTOMFORCE

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFCAP_ET_CUSTOMFORCE: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffcap_et_customforce#Discussion)

The effect represents a custom force effect. The Force Feedback plugIn developer is required to provide additional documentation to the application writer on how the effect should be used.
